samples.xml_description:
Design a simplified radix-2 divider on 8-bit numbers. Clock signal. Reset signal. Signed or unsigned operation. Input operand DIVIDEND. Input operand DIVISOR. Valid operation. Result ready. Result valid. Output result. 0 1 2 3 4 Initialize the operation. always @(*) begin
  if (opn_valid && ~res_valid) begin
    dividend_reg = dividend;
    divisor_reg = divisor;
    SR = {dividend_reg, 1'b0};
    NEG_DIVISOR = ~divisor_reg + 1'b1;
    cnt = 1;
    start_cnt = 1;
  end
  else begin
    dividend_reg = dividend_reg;
    divisor_reg = divisor_reg;
    SR = SR;
    NEG_DIVISOR = NEG_DIVISOR;
    cnt = cnt;
    start_cnt = start_cnt;
  end
end
 Start the division operation. always @(*) begin
  if (start_cnt) begin
    if (cnt[3]) begin
      cnt = 1;
      start_cnt = 0;
      result_reg = SR[15:1];
    end
    else begin
      cnt = cnt + 1;
      start_cnt = 1;
      result_reg = result_reg;
    end
    if (sign && dividend[15]) SR = {dividend_reg, 1'b0};
  end
  else begin
    cnt = cnt;
    start_cnt = start_cnt;
    result_reg = result_reg;
    if (sign && dividend[15]) SR = {dividend_reg, 1'b0};
  end
end
 Subtract the divisor from the shift register. always @(*) begin
  if (start_cnt) begin
    SUB = SR[15:7] + NEG_DIVISOR;
  end
  else begin
    SUB = {8'b0, SR[6:0], 1'b0} + NEG_DIVISOR;
  end
end
 Update the shift register. always @(*) begin
  if (start_cnt) begin
    if (SUB[8]) begin
      SR = {SR[14:0], 1'b0};
    end
    else begin
      SR = {SUB[7:0], SR[6:0], 1'b1};
    end
  end
  else begin
    if (sign && dividend[15]) SR = {dividend_reg, 1'b0};
    else SR = SR;
  end
end
 Update the result. always @(*) begin
  if (cnt[3]) begin
    if (sign && dividend[15]) result_reg = ~SR[15:8] + 1'b1;
    else result_reg = SR[15:8];
  end
  else result_reg = result_reg;
end
 Update the result. always @(*) begin
  if (rst) res_valid = 0;
  else if (cnt[3]) res_valid = 1;
  else if (res_valid && res_ready) res_valid = 0;
  else res_valid = res_valid;
end
